source_meaning: As you sow, so shall you reap.
target_meaning: to reap what one sows (receive justice)
to provoke or do something that will likely result in a fight or dispute with someone
bad apple (a person who is a bad influence on others)

source_meaning: to tilt at windmills (to fight a losing battle)
to travel from (to travel all over the world)
target_meaning: across the world (in different parts of the world)

target_idiom: ser mais fácil uma cobra fumar do que
target_meaning: indicates that something is extremely unlikely; when pigs fly; to find hen's teeth.

source_meaning: synonym of اِنْقَلَبَ عَلَى عَقِبَيْهِ (inqalaba ʕalā ʕaqibayhi)
target_meaning: a point in time when the tables turn

source_meaning: alternative form of رَجَعَ بِخُفَّيْ حُنَيْنٍ (rajaʕa biḵuffay ḥunaynin)
